summary:
Great! The test has passed. I found and fixed the needle in the haystack:

The problem was a port mismatch in the nginx configuration. The Flask application was running on port 5000, but nginx was configured to proxy requests to port 5001. I fixed this by changing the proxy_pass directive in `/etc/nginx/sites-available/default` from `http://127.0.0.1:5001` to `http://127.0.0.1:5000`.

The test script now passes all tests, confirming that the issue has been resolved.
